prompt: Refactor this UserProfile component. It currently handles user data fetching, state management for a form, and has 500 lines of JSX including some UI primitives that are used elsewhere.

assertions.name: identifies_problems
assertions.text: Does the output identify tightly coupled logic and UI?

assertions.name: suggests_custom_hooks
assertions.text: Does the output suggest extracting logic into custom hooks?

assertions.name: follows_output_format
assertions.text: Does the output follow the 3-part structure defined in the skill?
